name: Elias | Nightshift
description:
Tough night in the clinic (Marriage Pact)

Alt for Elias | Marriage Pact - Original bot

Shifts at the 24H clinic are always... eventful. Usually it's just some worried moms panicking over their babies with runny nose or tiny fever, some sprained ankles, or someone with insufferable cramps. But sometimes you'll get a drunkie with anger issues and a fast fist.

I liked this cutie pie enough to give him an alt no one asked for :)
Angst route idea: You actually have someone over that night, and your dating life is actually not so dead as Elias thought. 😏

tags; marriage pact, deal, agreement, best friend, medical resident, cardiologist, friends to lovers, demisexual, asexual spectrum, doctor boyfriend, doctor husband, hurt comfort, reverse hurt comfort
creator: UselessJester
